description: Shared API contract for frontend, backend, and AI service collaboration.
principles: All factual AI outputs must trace to Memory evidence records.
Outbound candidate discovery must retain source-backed signals and must not turn missing public data into a negative founder fact.
A Founder Score persists across applications and is one input to, not a replacement for, opportunity screening.
The final investment decision is made by a human reviewer.
The adversary is a one-pass devil's advocate, not a debate agent.
Adversarial objections are verified by the same truth-gap Judge used for normal claim verification.
The optional verdict brief summarizes verified attacks for readability but does not decide who won.
Operational traces record stage metadata, input/output identifiers, and failures; they never expose model chain-of-thought.
Backend owns durable workflow state, human decisions, activation, and outcome feedback; the AI service owns bounded analysis stages.

thesis_id.description: The persisted thesis version that sourced or screened this deal.

canonical_url.description: Final canonical URL after redirects or normalization.

content_hash.description: Hash of the bounded raw text used for deduplication.

raw_document_id.description: Backend-owned reference to retained raw source content when storage is permitted.

thesis.example: Find technical founders in Europe working on AI infrastructure with execution signals, no public VC funding, and product traction.

criteria.description: Criteria are explicit about whether they filter, rank, or require human confirmation.

resolution_note.description: Name-only matches are provisional and require human merge confirmation when ambiguous.

trust_score.description: Per-claim Trust Score derived from source quality, corroboration, and contradictions.

opportunity_axes.description: The three independent, non-averaged opportunity axes required by the challenge.

weakest_opportunity_axis.description: The weakest of the three decision axes; it deterministically selects the counter-case focus.

weakest_axis.description: Supporting diagnostic lens derived from the weakest opportunity axis.

recommendation_basis.description: Explains the decision from independent axes. It must not be an averaged score.

speculation_label.example: Speculation: risk inferred from missing evidence, not a known fact.

status_detail.description: Operational status only; no chain-of-thought or hidden model reasoning.

endpoints.description: Create or update the fund-specific sourcing thesis.
Start thesis-driven outbound candidate discovery and ranking.
Fetch source-backed candidates and their ranking/eligibility status.
Record human outreach/activation and convert a candidate into the common deal funnel when an application arrives.
Create a deal from reviewer intake.
Fetch deal metadata and status.
Start research, crawling, and evidence extraction.
Start screening score generation.
Start investment memo generation.
Start devil's advocate and truth-gap verification stages.
Optionally generate a non-authoritative reviewer brief from verified objections.
Fetch the full reviewer decision packet.
Poll async job status.
Record the audit-logged human reviewer decision.
Record sourcing and activation outcomes for source-channel feedback; this never changes a historical AI output.
Fetch operational stage trace events and human decisions without model chain-of-thought.
Turn a configurable investment thesis into explicit, reviewable outbound discovery queries.
Fetch a bounded list of public, robots-permitted source pages for traceable Memory ingestion.
Discover source-backed founder/company candidates from supplied crawled documents or live web search.
Rank candidates against thesis signals while explicitly marking no-public-funding findings as human-confirmation required.
Run the complete bounded sourcing workflow: thesis plan, cited discovery, optional source crawling, and evidence-gated ranking.
Persist a founder's evidence, milestones, and Founder Score across opportunities.
Read a persistent founder profile or return a clearly labeled cold-start profile.
Create a provisional founder identity reference; ambiguous normalized-name matches require human merge confirmation.
Create search queries and crawl targets from deal intake.
Extract Memory evidence records from crawled text.
Apply per-claim Trust Scores and flag direct evidence contradictions before screening.
Score the deal across venture screening axes.
Write the investment memo from evidence and scores.
Write the strongest bounded counter-case against investing.
Reuse the truth-gap Judge to badge adversarial objections as verified, unverified, or speculation.
Optionally summarize verified objections for human readability without making the final decision.

deterministic_counter_case_lens_selectio.rule: Select the weakest independent opportunity axis first, then map it to a functional counter-case focus. This is not a personality or debate role.
